description: A curated, seeded persona and scenario library for hotato simulate. Each entry is a hotato.scenario.v1 doc that renders through the deterministic scripted caller into a labelled origin=simulated conversation. A fixed (scenario, seed) renders byte-identical every run, so the same test case is a stable, reusable fixture across machines and CI runs.

scenarios.name: barge-in-missed
scenarios.title: Missed barge-in (hard interruption)
scenarios.tests: The caller takes the floor mid-sentence at a fixed offset. Run it to see whether your agent stops its own speech and listens.

scenarios.name: backchannel-not-floor-take
scenarios.title: Backchannel that is not a floor-take
scenarios.tests: The caller drops short acknowledgements (mm-hmm, right) while listening. Run it to see whether your agent holds the floor instead of treating a backchannel as an interruption.

scenarios.name: dead-air-silence
scenarios.title: Long silence and dead air
scenarios.tests: The caller opens, then goes quiet and re-prompts. Run it to see whether your agent recovers a stalled call rather than waiting on empty air.

scenarios.name: over-eager-early-response
scenarios.title: Mid-utterance pause before an over-eager reply
scenarios.tests: The caller pauses in the middle of one request. Run it to see whether your agent waits for the caller to finish rather than replying into the pause.

scenarios.name: caller-talk-over
scenarios.title: Caller talking over the agent
scenarios.tests: The caller overlaps the agent twice at fixed offsets. Run it to see whether your agent yields under sustained talk-over.

scenarios.name: fast-interrupter
scenarios.title: Fast interrupter (pacing variation)
scenarios.tests: A fast-paced caller cuts in very early. Run it to see how your agent handles an impatient, quick-talking caller.

scenarios.name: slow-speaker
scenarios.title: Slow speaker (pacing variation)
scenarios.tests: A slow-paced caller spreads one request across long turns and states a member id. Run it to see whether your agent waits out the pace and keeps the caller's ground-truth fact.
